title: Very Sweet Berries
description: A resource pack that replaces Sweet Berries with one of 4 different types of berries.
body:
This Resource Pack will change vanilla Sweet Berries to one of four types of berries: Blueberry, Blackberry, Strawberry or Raspberry.

**Future plans** _(not so distant)_**:**
- add mod support

Language support:
ENG | RU | BY
